name: product-forge
description: Build and evaluate product strategy, management, and UX across the 12-domain Product Experience Strategy frame — grounded in research and named-practitioner authority, with rubrics, a 23-critic adversarial council, runnable methodology playbooks, and a product-corpus MCP for per-instance corpus retrieval.

corpus_dir.title: Product corpus directory
corpus_dir.description: Path to this product engagement's corpus (the folder a /product-corpus-export run writes: discovery, strategy, definition, experience, operations) for the product-corpus MCP. Optional — leave unset to run methodology, evaluation, and council without live corpus retrieval.
